mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(d.DB_ID) AS dbId, TRIM(d.DB_NAME) AS dbName, TRIM(d.DB_DESC) AS dbDesc, TRIM(d.CONNECTION_URL) AS connectionUrl, TRIM(d.DRIVER_CLASS) AS driverClass, TRIM(d.DB_USER_ID) AS dbUserId, d.DB_PASSWORD AS dbPassword, d.JNDI_YN AS jndiYn, TRIM(d.JNDI_ID) AS jndiId, TRIM(d.JNDI_PROVIDER_URL) AS jndiProviderUrl, TRIM(d.JNDI_CONTEXT_FACTORY) AS jndiContextFactory, d.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(d.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_SQL_CONF d WHERE d.DB_ID = #{dbId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_SQL_CONF WHERE DB_ID = #{dbId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_SQL_CONF ( DB_ID, DB_NAME, DB_DESC, CONNECTION_URL, DRIVER_CLASS, DB_USER_ID, DB_PASSWORD, JNDI_YN, JNDI_ID, JNDI_PROVIDER_URL, JNDI_CONTEXT_FACTORY, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.dbId}, #{dto.dbName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.dbDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.connectionUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.driverClass, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.dbUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.dbPassword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.jndiYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.jndiId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.jndiProviderUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.jndiContextFactory, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.sql: d.DB_ID, d.DB_NAME, d.DB_DESC, d.CONNECTION_URL, d.DRIVER_CLASS, d.DB_USER_ID, d.DB_PASSWORD, d.JNDI_YN, d.JNDI_ID, d.JNDI_PROVIDER_URL, d.JNDI_CONTEXT_FACTORY, d.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, d.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID

if.test: searchField != null and searchField != '' and searchValue != null and searchValue != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT TRIM(d.DB_ID) AS dbId, TRIM(d.DB_NAME) AS dbName, TRIM(d.DB_DESC) AS dbDesc, TRIM(d.CONNECTION_URL) AS connectionUrl, TRIM(d.DRIVER_CLASS) AS driverClass, TRIM(d.DB_USER_ID) AS dbUserId, d.DB_PASSWORD AS dbPassword, d.JNDI_YN AS jndiYn, TRIM(d.JNDI_ID) AS jndiId, TRIM(d.JNDI_PROVIDER_URL) AS jndiProviderUrl, TRIM(d.JNDI_CONTEXT_FACTORY) AS jndiContextFactory, d.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(d.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_SQL_CONF d
ORDER BY
d.DB_ID d.DB_NAME d.DB_USER_ID d.JNDI_YN d.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME d.DB_ID
ASC DESC ASC
